title: Ability to view subitems from 'overview' page of an item
excerpt: It would be helpful to be able to see and edit subitems that are coming from a connected board. In the image, you are able to edit everything in this view except the subitems section titled ‘key result’.

posts.author: annadayton (Anna Dayton)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful to be able to see and edit subitems that are coming from a connected board. In the image, you are able to edit everything in this view except the subitems section titled ‘key result’.

Screen Shot 2022-02-09 at 10.52.05 AM1086×1050 35.9 KB
